composer: Keiji Takeuchi, Akiyoshi "Einosuke" Nagao, Katsumi Tanaka

distinctive_elements: Certain tracks removed from US/EU versions due to potential copyright infringement with New Order songs
Bonus stage music tracks (levels 3, 6, 9, 10) were swapped between Japanese and Western versions
One music track entirely removed from Space Megaforce (Western release)
influences: New Order (potential similarity in removed tracks)

notes.data_availability: No documented tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics found in available sources
notes.version_differences: Japanese version (Super Aleste) contains more original music than US/EU versions (Space Megaforce). Specific track names, tempos, and musical parameters not documented in sources.
notes.limitation: Sources focus on gameplay mechanics, story differences, and high-level content differences rather than musical analysis
